Body.Content:
Microsoft Entra ID Account Recovery is an advanced authentication recovery mechanism that enables users to regain access to their organizational accounts when they've lost access to all registered authentication methods. This feature adds additional support for protecting the account recovery flow by enabling CA policies to be applied. Learn more

GA date: May CY2026

Preview date: March CY2026
